overview.description: Kadammanittapally (also known as St. John's Orthodox Church) in Kadammanitta, Kerala, India, is a church in the Thumpamon Diocese of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church, named after St John the Baptist. Sacred footprints of Geevarghese Mar Gregorios of Parumala are claimed to be in the parish.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kadammanitta
topPlaces.description: Kadammanitta is a village in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India which is famous for Padayani.

topPlaces.name: Mylapra
topPlaces.description: Mylapra is a small town in Pathanamthitta district in the Indian state of Kerala. It comes under the Mylapra Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Pathanamthitta
topPlaces.description: The Eparchy of Pathanamthitta is a Syro-Malankara Catholic Church ecclesiastical territory or eparchy of the Catholic Church in Kerala, India. The diocese was created by Pope Benedict XVI on 25 January 2010.

topPlaces.name: Vazhamuttom
topPlaces.description: Vazhamuttom is a village township near to Pathanamthitta Town in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India. River Achankovil split Vazhamuttom in to two parts West Vazhamuttom and East Vazhamuttom.

topPlaces.name: Kumplampoika
topPlaces.description: Kumplampoika is a village in Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Keekozhur
topPlaces.description: Keekozhur, also spelt as Keekozhoor, is a small village on the side of Pamba River, situated 4 km from Ranni and 9 km from Kozhencherry. It is in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mount Bethany EHSS
topPlaces.description: Mount Bethany English Medium Higher Secondary School is a school in Kerala, India. The school began providing education to lower primary level classes in the late 1970s.

topPlaces.name: Pathanamthitta
topPlaces.description: Pathanamthitta (IPA: [pɐt̪ːɐnɐn̪d̪iʈːɐ]), is a Municipal Town in southern Kerala, India, spread over an area of 23.5 km2 (9.1 sq mi). It is the administrative capital of Pathanamthitta district.

items.note: Kadammanitta is a village in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India which is famous for Padayani.
Mylapra is a small town in Pathanamthitta district in the Indian state of Kerala. It comes under the Mylapra Panchayath.

The Eparchy of Pathanamthitta is a Syro-Malankara Catholic Church ecclesiastical territory or eparchy of the Catholic Church in Kerala, India. The diocese was created by Pope Benedict XVI on 25 January 2010.
Vazhamuttom is a village township near to Pathanamthitta Town in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India. River Achankovil split Vazhamuttom in to two parts West Vazhamuttom and East Vazhamuttom.
Kumplampoika is a village in Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India.
Keekozhur, also spelt as Keekozhoor, is a small village on the side of Pamba River, situated 4 km from Ranni and 9 km from Kozhencherry. It is in the state of Kerala, India.
Mount Bethany English Medium Higher Secondary School is a school in Kerala, India. The school began providing education to lower primary level classes in the late 1970s.
Pathanamthitta (IPA: [pɐt̪ːɐnɐn̪d̪iʈːɐ]), is a Municipal Town in southern Kerala, India, spread over an area of 23.5 km2 (9.1 sq mi). It is the administrative capital of Pathanamthitta district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kadammanittapally?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kadammanittapally is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (91 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kadammanittapally?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kadammanittapally at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kadammanittapally?
faq.a: Stays in Kadammanittapally start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kadammanittapally?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kadammanitta, Mylapra, Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Pathanamthitta, Vazhamuttom, Kumplampoika.
